categories.title: Web Application Security
categories.description: 600+ interactive test cases for authentication, injection, business logic, and OWASP WSTG-aligned web assessments.

categories.title: Mobile Application Security
categories.description: Android and iOS testing checklist covering static analysis, runtime instrumentation, and API security.

categories.title: AWS Cloud Security
categories.description: Filterable controls for IAM, EC2, S3, RDS, Lambda, EKS, and compliance reviews across AWS services.

categories.title: Azure Cloud Security
categories.description: Identity, networking, storage, compute, and logging controls for Microsoft Azure environments.

categories.title: Google Cloud Platform
categories.description: IAM, VPC, GCS, GKE, Cloud SQL, and Security Command Center checks for GCP workloads.

categories.title: LLM and AI Security
categories.description: Governance, red teaming, RAG safety, and deployment controls for large language model applications.

categories.title: MCP Server Security
categories.description: Model Context Protocol inventory, STDIO hardening, tool poisoning tests, and agent supply-chain controls.

categories.title: API Security
categories.description: REST and GraphQL testing for BOLA, JWT flaws, rate limits, and mass assignment.

categories.title: Kubernetes and Containers
categories.description: Cluster RBAC, pod security, image scanning, and Docker escape prevention.

categories.title: Cloud Security (Multi-Provider)
categories.description: Cross-cloud IAM, storage exposure, metadata SSRF, logging, and misconfiguration checks for AWS, Azure, and GCP.

categories.title: Active Directory Security
categories.description: Domain enumeration, Kerberos attacks, LDAP misconfigs, privileged groups, and lateral movement controls.

categories.title: Network Security
categories.description: Segmentation, firewall rules, VPN exposure, internal service enumeration, and lateral movement paths.

categories.title: DevSecOps and CI/CD
categories.description: Pipeline secrets, artifact integrity, SAST/DAST gates, dependency scanning, and deployment hardening.

categories.title: OSINT and Reconnaissance
categories.description: Passive information gathering, asset discovery, leaked credentials, and attack surface mapping.

categories.title: Infrastructure and Host Security
categories.description: Linux and Windows hardening, patch management, service configuration, and host logging.

categories.title: CI/CD Pipeline Security
categories.description: Build pipeline integrity, runner isolation, secret management, and supply-chain controls.

categories.title: Secure Code Review
categories.description: Source-level checks for dangerous APIs, crypto misuse, injection sinks, and authentication flaws.
